description: ol-return-in-comprehension (issue #114): a `return` inside a `map` comprehension body is a semantic error and is reported with this code (not `ol-return-outside-proc`), because a comprehension body is not a procedure body even when nested in one. `params` carry the offending keyword and the enclosing comprehension `form`. The span points at the `return` control word. `:nums` is declared first so only the control-flow code fires.
